title: ammi majus var. genuinum
intro: Ammi majus var. genuinum, also known as False Queen Anne's Lace, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Ammi majus var. genuinum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
